objectStorageName.markdownDescription:
Object storage logical name

Identifies the [object storage](https://doc.log10x.com/run/input/objectStorage#objectstorageccessclassname) from which to delete the target index objects (e.g., 'AWS').

objectStorageArgs.markdownDescription:
Custom object storage args

Custom arguments passed as a map to the constructor of the underlying [object storage](https://doc.log10x.com/run/input/objectStorage/index/delete/#queryobjectobjectstoragename). This list is expected to hold pairs of key values (e.g., args: [key1, value1, key2, value2])

container.markdownDescription:
Object storage container containing index objects

Specifies the object storage container (e.g., AWS S3 bucket) name from which to delete [TenXTemplate Filters](https://doc.log10x.com/run/input/objectStorage/index/#tenxtemplate-filters)

target.markdownDescription:
Logical name identifying the origin of 'indexDeleteObject'

Specifies a logical name to delete [TenXTemplate Filters](https://doc.log10x.com/run/input/objectStorage/index/#TenXTemplate-filters) produced for [indexDeleteTargetObject](https://doc.log10x.com/run/input/objectStorage/index/delete/#indexdeletetargetObject) under. This name commonly specifies the app which generated the events enclosed within this blob (e.g. 'acme-client').

object.markdownDescription:
The target object whose index objects to delete from storage

Sets the name of the object (e.g., log file) whose associated index objects to delete from [indexDeleteContainer](https://doc.log10x.com/run/input/objectStorage/index/delete/#indexdeletecontainer)
